title: UofA Pack Manifest
description: The contract for a packs/<name>/pack.json. Pack-shaped architecture spec §2a/§7: a uniform envelope (identity + version + core-compatibility + dependencies) around one-or-more leg-specific capability blocks. LEGACY-TOLERANT during migration: the pre-refactor flat detection fields (shapes/rules/oos/derivations/template/prompt/factors/weakener_patterns) are still accepted so existing packs validate unchanged; they will be expressed as a `detection` capability block as each pack is migrated, after which the legacy fields are removed and `capabilities`/`coreCompatibility` become required.

coreCompatibility.description: Semver range of the core this pack requires (e.g. '>=0.5.0'). Enforced at load once migrated.

dependencies.description: Other packs this pack requires, by name + semver range.

capabilities.description: One block per capability the pack provides. Same envelope, leg-specific payload (§2a).

weakener_patterns.description: LEGACY patternId count — drifts from the rules files. Superseded by the per-capability `patternIds` list, which cannot lie.

leg.description: Which capability boundary this block implements.

interfaceVersion.description: Semver of the interface this capability implements; core enforces compatibility on load.

firewallPlacement.description: Which firewall region this capability's output belongs to (spec §0/§4). The P2.5 chokepoint reads this to decide which policy applies.

provenance.description: What this capability stamps into the bundle's provenance (the pack's identity + version).

payload.description: Leg-specific payload. detection -> {shapes, rules, patternIds[], oos, derivations}; measurement/guardrail/reference -> {impl: 'module:Class', outputKeys[]}.
